IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (23510685.pdf)
SUMMARY: A Global HR Professional with 10+ years' progressive experience across industries and geographies. A unique skillset combination project management, HR business partnering, and building HR programs aligned with business strategy to drive successful results.
SKILLS: Project management, HR business partnering, Building HR programs aligned with business strategy, Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, SAP, Adobe Acrobat Professional, Data analysis, Database administration, Leadership development, Legal compliance, Mandarin Chinese (native), Spanish (basic), German (basic)

DESCRIPTION: Managed US R&D Center relocation project. Partnered with senior leaders and HR Business Partners across multiple countries to develop leadership programs and strategic HR projects.
